json.message: License was not entered. Please enter a valid PVS-Studio license or request a trial license at https://pvs-studio.com/en/pvs-studio/try-free/. You can use credentials mode to enter license information.Command example: pvs-studio-analyzer credentials "PVS-Studio Free" FREE-FREE-FREE-FREE.The analyzer writes the license to the license file located in the default directory: ~/.config/PVS-Studio/PVS-Studio.lic.
